'''nalogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:micell|micell]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:micell|micell]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nalogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nælegeth|nælegeth]] || [[word:nælegej|nælegej]] || [[word:nælegesh|nælegesh]] || [[word:nælege|nælege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nalologoth|nalologoth]] || [[word:nalologoj|nalologoj]] || [[word:nalologosh|nalologosh]] || [[word:nalologo|nalologo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nalogoth|nalogoth]] || [[word:nalogoj|nalogoj]] || [[word:nalogosh|nalogosh]] || [[word:nalogo|nalogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nalofgoth|nalofgoth]] || [[word:nalofgoj|nalofgoj]] || [[word:nalofgosh|nalofgosh]] || [[word:nalofgof|nalofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nalogotho|nalogotho]] || [[word:nalogojo|nalogojo]] || [[word:nalogosho|nalogosho]] || [[word:nalogoko|nalogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nalogoth|nalogoth]] || [[word:nalogoj|nalogoj]] || [[word:nalogosh|nalogosh]] || [[word:nalogo|nalogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nalogothol|nalogothol]] || [[word:nalogojol|nalogojol]] || [[word:nalogoshol|nalogoshol]] || [[word:nalogokol|nalogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nalogothotho|nalogothotho]] || [[word:nalogojojo|nalogojojo]] || [[word:nalogoshosho|nalogoshosho]] || [[word:nalogoko|nalogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nalogothon|nalogothon]] || [[word:nalogojon|nalogojon]] || [[word:nalogoshon|nalogoshon]] || [[word:nalogokon|nalogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nalogothoro|nalogothoro]] || [[word:nalogojoro|nalogojoro]] || [[word:nalogoshoro|nalogoshoro]] || [[word:nalogokoro|nalogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
